Annual Report Data Analysis - Question 3.03 and 3.04

Tristan Burgess and Cristin Young

2026-04-07

3. Did EBP/CDEP services impact clinical and functional outcomes for clients who participated?

Inclusion criteria: 1. must have initial time point data (i.e., be enrolled in an intervention), 2. must have a valid assessment collected at both intake and discharge time points, and 3. limited to tools with a clinical cut-off.

Scoring: An increase in score indicates a positive outcome. There are no benchmarks or clinical cutoffs established for NOMS scoring — if the follow-up assessment score is higher than the initial score, a positive outcome is indicated.

Assumptions: Filtered out dates before 2024-01-01 and after the date the code was run. Filtered data that’s >3 days from initial assessment and paired to the LAST follow-up. Filtered positive outcomes that had NAs before computing %.

3.03 To what extent did parents/caregivers report improved mental health for themselves and their child after receiving the intervention?
